name: Narsai's Chocolate Decadence Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F (220°C). Reserve half an ounce of chocolate for decoration.
2. In a heatproof bowl over low heat, melt the remaining chocolate and butter together, stirring constantly until smooth.
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs and sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until the mixture is thick and pale, about 5 minutes.
5. Gradually add the flour to the egg mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Pour the egg mixture into the melted chocolate and butter mixture, stirring gently to combine.
7. Spread the batter evenly in a greased, lined 8-inch (20 cm) cake pan.
8. Bake for no more than 15 minutes until the center is still soft.
9. Allow the cake to cool completely.
10. Remove from the pan and chill overnight.
11. Unmold the cake and top with sweetened whipped cream if desired.
12. Decorate with shaved chocolate before serving.
13. Serve with raspberry sauce, if desired.
